sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57016" key="kefalo/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεφᾰλό-πους</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ποδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, in pl., lamb's or goat's <sense id="n57016.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">trotters</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0733.tlg001:40" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cass.Fel.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
